feature.title: Global Mission Feed
feature.purpose: Aggregate the newest cross-lane tasks, evidence, outcomes, traces, and gates into a filterable company-wide stream that opens the source lane trail.

researchInfluences.name: Activity Feed pattern
researchInfluences.takeaway: Recent actions should appear in a chronological stream so users can monitor changes without visiting each item separately.

researchInfluences.name: Activity feed components
researchInfluences.takeaway: Useful feeds include source, type/icon, short description, and time.

researchInfluences.name: Dashboard hierarchy
researchInfluences.takeaway: Command-center dashboards should surface the right data at the right hierarchy with minimal visual noise.

implementation.clickThrough: Feed cards open the source lane's Trail view.
